name: git-gremlin
description: Git commit, contextual review, and GitHub PR helper for Codex with stronger automatic skill triggers and scoped mutation gates.

interface.shortDescription: Review diffs, commit staged changes, and draft PRs safely
interface.longDescription: Git Gremlin bundles Codex skills for recognizing review, commit, and GitHub PR intent from natural prompts, compiling repo instructions into contextual review passes, drafting conventional commit messages and PR descriptions from git context, committing from explicit commit intent, and keeping PR creation behind a confirmation gate.
defaultPrompt: Use Git Gremlin to commit my staged changes.
Use Git Gremlin to review the current diff with repo conventions loaded.
Use Git Gremlin to open a GitHub PR for this branch.
